73728.subject: Token Markets Grow Up
73728.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/eaa70932-7ce4-467e-b338-a662ed575d6a/0xR_NL_Banner_Heading_Wordmark.jpg?t=1776775276)
Caption: 

GM and happy Thursday!

Crypto struggles while equities hang out at highs. Miners get the best of both worlds as IREN rallies off of a new Blackwell purchase agreement.

Below, we break down the launch of the Transparency Alliance, Blockworks' effort to bring standardized token disclosures to a historically opaque industry.

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/42e942ec-f31d-4957-8722-a3ac7b121e1e/0xR_NL_Market_Update.png?t=1767631151) [Market Update]
Caption: 

Strength in equities is not matched in crypto. As the S&P 500 and Nasdaq futures traded a new all-time high yesterday, BTC traded down to $74,025, its lowest level over the past 38 days. With this weakness, the majority of crypto indices are red on the week, with the Privacy sector as the top loser (-12.7%). 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/c0e46c74-b4e4-427d-9f0c-405ce3582f76/image.png?t=1779971399)
Caption: 

Focusing on the winners, Crypto Miners are at the top of the leaderboard, up 18.4% on the week. IREN jumped 14% yesterday following the announcement of a $1.6B purchase agreement for air-cooled Blackwell systems supplied by Dell. This equipment could increase IREN’s annual revenue by 19%. The announcement renewed momentum across the Crypto Miners sector, with most names trading at or near recent highs, and reminding us where the hot ball of money is.  

_— __[Luke](https://x.com/0xMether)_

———————————————————————————

# Formalizing Disclosure in Token Markets

Token markets have an unsolved information asymmetry problem.

When you buy a stock, you get a prospectus, a 10-K, and quarterly filings with audited numbers, disclosed insiders, and legally binding representations about material information. The disclosure burden may be imperfect, but the framework is legible. When purchasing a token, the burden of collecting this information from various governance forums, Discord channels, X/Twitter accounts, and blog posts falls on the holder. Market maker agreements, if they exist, are buried or undisclosed. This gap between what issuers know and what tokenholders can access is structural, and it has been the engine behind most of crypto's worst moments of the last decade.

Today, Blockworks launches the [Transparency Alliance](https://blockworks.com/insights/blockworks-launches-transparency-alliance) to address this directly.

The Alliance formalizes the [Token Transparency Framework](https://blockworks.com/token-transparency) (TTF), which Blockworks first introduced in June 2025, into an industry-wide standard backed by t

Від роботи в таксі до звичайного вживаного автомобіля ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏  ͏ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­ ­  

[carVertical logo](https://www.carvertical.com/uk)

Таксі на пенсії… біля твого порогу

[Taxi makeover illustration](https://www.carvertical.com/uk/pricing?voucher=taximakeover25)

Перевір історію автомобіля

[Отримай знижку 25 % на звіт про історію](https://www.carvertical.com/uk/pricing?voucher=taximakeover25)

Ми натрапили на Mercedes-Benz E 200… і його історія значно насиченіша, ніж у більшості автомобілів.

[Mercedes photos before](https://www.carvertical.com/uk/pricing?voucher=taximakeover25)

Усе почалося в Німеччині — не сімейний автомобіль, не машина для поїздок на вихідні, а повноцінне таксі. Завжди в русі, завжди в роботі — цей автомобіль, здається, знає місто краще за багатьох водіїв. Усього за 3 роки — понад 300 000 км. Це не пробіг. Це робота без вихідних із постійними переробками.

Потім ситуація різко змінилася.

✈️ Від роботи в таксі до шоуруму

Після кількох років інтенсивної експлуатації німецька глава цього Mercedes завершилася, і він знову з’явився вже в Румунії.

Але це був уже інший автомобіль. Десь по дорозі він втратив 200 000 км пробігу. І водночас зник знайомий образ таксі. Нова фарба, охайний вигляд — і перед нами вже «ідеально доглянутий» уживаний автомобіль.

[Mercedes photos after](https://www.carvertical.com/uk/pricing?voucher=taximakeover25)

🧠 Придбай зношене авто, швидко онови, вигідно продай

І це не виняток — така схема працює по всій Європі. Робота в таксі — це великий пробіг і сильний знос. Потім машини вивозять за кордон, «оновлюють» і повертають на ринок із привабливішою історією.

Результат? Нормальний вигляд, який може приховувати:

⚠️ значне зношення від постійної експлуатації

⚠️ пошкодження салону через постійний потік пасажирів

⚠️ висока ймовірність дорогого ремонту

⚠️ пробіг, що не відповідає дійсності

Fear and Greed sits at 

 Fear
territory and BTC is near
$73K
this morning after sliding below that level yesterday. The
unusual story is how it got there. US equities hit all-time highs
on the back of a US-Iran peace deal, while BTC moved lower
alongside oil, not higher alongside stocks.

The disconnect is striking. But the bigger headlines are in the
consumer and institutional layer. Major apps are embedding
stablecoins at scale. AI agents are getting trading access. And
Elon Musk is reportedly discussing a Tesla-SpaceX combination
with a Bitcoin treasury attached.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

SoFi Just Launched the First Bank-Issued Stablecoin in a
Consumer App

SoFi made SoFiUSD available to its 14.7 million members on May
27 directly inside its banking app, the first time a US national
bank has embedded a bank-issued stablecoin into a consumer
interface.

Members can buy, hold, and use it alongside savings, spending,
and investment accounts in one place.

What does SoFi say SoFiUSD is and is not covered by in terms of
FDIC insurance?

73715.subject: The 31% drop Google triggered
73715.body:
----------
######                      [Sign Up](http://utm.genai.works/r/gg2ubr5) | [Collaborate with us](https://6hhfxazcbpc.typeform.com/to/uXIl0IFH?utm_source=atlas&utm_medium=newsletter&utm_campaign=general_2026_05_11&utm_content=banner_post)


--------------------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/8776fa6e-e2d0-4aec-9648-1bed6de3a659/GenAI_Daily_Banner.jpg?t=1778687445)
Caption: 


----------

----------
**Welcome back!** Google bundled Gemini, Wiz, Mandiant and CodeMender into one autonomous security platform and the cybersecurity sector lost billions in market cap inside a session. Meta started putting price tags on Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp and Meta AI. Amazon MGM greenlit three AI-assisted animated series with five-week pilot deadlines. OpenAI's non-profit committed $250M to study the labor damage caused by the technology its for-profit sells.

———————————————————————————

**In today's Generative AI Newsletter:**

* **Google:** Why is it a terrible week for cybersecurity companies?

* **Meta:** What does Instagram Plus actually cost you?

* **Amazon MGM:** Which directors are getting AI funds and a five-week deadline?

* **OpenAI Foundation:** Why is the non-profit funding studies on AI job loss?


----------

----------
## [Claude learned to check its own code for vulnerabilities](https://cloud.google.com/blog/products/identity-security/introducing-google-ai-threat-defense)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/dfdcff5a-f1ff-4a5d-9567-87de880670b2/google_ai_threat_defense_1920x1080.png?t=1779958166)
Caption: 

Google Cloud launched Google AI Threat Defense, an always-on platform that fuses Gemini, Wiz, CodeMender and Mandiant into a single stack. 

And it just happens that Zscaler dropped 31%, CrowdStrike fell 3.4%, Palo Alto Networks lost 3% and the First Trust Cybersecurity ETF closed down 2.7%.

**The details:**

* Gemini handles reasoning, Wiz maps live exposure across cloud and code, CodeMender writes patches inside the developer's IDE, Mandiant supplies the response playbooks.

* No single frontier model finds every vulnerability, so AI Threat Defense routes the heaviest scans to internet-facing apps and authentication logic.

* CodeMender generates the fix and the verification tests automatically before anything ships.

* Zscaler’s 31% drop also tracked an earnings cut and a below-consensus FY27 guide released the night before Google's keynote.

* Accenture, Deloitte, PwC and Netenrich will deploy and manage the platform for enterprise customers.

The exploit window has collapsed from weeks to hours and security teams cannot keep up by hand. The price the market put on that capability is whatever Zscaler, CrowdStrike and Palo Alto can no longer charge for the same work.


----------

------
